message:
fix(backend): feedback client reuse, media limits, GHE support, cache stampede (#7058-#7066) (#7070)

* fix(feedback): GHE support, shared client, sync close, webhook 500s, screenshot count, LimitReader

- #7058: Replace hardcoded api.github.com with resolveGitHubAPIBase() in
  fetchPRPages, fetchGitHubIssuesFromRepo, and all other GitHub API calls
- #7059: Replace per-call http.Client with h.httpClient in
  verifyGitHubIssueOwnership, closeGitHubIssue, addIssueComment,
  getLatestBotComment, postGitHubIssue, addPRComment
- #7060: Make closeGitHubIssue synchronous and return error; CloseRequest
  now returns 502 on GitHub API failure instead of false "closed" status
- #7061: Webhook store failures (UpdateFeatureRequestStatus,
  CloseFeatureRequest, UpdateFeatureRequestPR, etc.) now return 500
  so GitHub retries the delivery
- #7062: addIssueComment now returns error; screenshot Uploaded count
  incremented only after successful delivery, Failed count on error
- #7063: fetchGitHubIssuesFromRepo uses io.LimitReader(maxGitHubResponseBytes)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(media): shared client, LimitReader, singleflight for YouTube/Medium

- #7064: YouTube and Medium handlers use io.LimitReader (5 MB cap) on all
  external response reads to prevent memory exhaustion
- #7065: Package-level shared http.Client for YouTube and Medium fetches
  instead of creating a new client per call
- #7066: singleflight.Group coalesces concurrent cold-cache fetches into
  a single external API call for both getPlaylistVideos and getMediumPosts

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
